comment: This is generated by ESQL's AbstractFunctionTestCase. Do not edit it. See ../README.md for how to regenerate it.
name: sparkline
description: The values representing the y-axis values of a sparkline graph for a given aggregation over a period of time.

params.name: field
params.description: Expression that calculates the y-axis value of the sparkline graph for each datapoint.

params.name: key
params.description: Numeric or date expression from which to derive buckets.

params.name: buckets
params.description: Target number of buckets, or desired bucket size if `from` and `to` parameters are omitted.

params.name: from
params.description: Start of the range. Can be a number, a date or a date expressed as a string.

params.name: to
params.description: End of the range. Can be a number, a date or a date expressed as a string.

examples:
FROM employees
| STATS sparkline = SPARKLINE(COUNT(*), hire_date, 20, "1985-01-01T00:00:00Z", "1985-12-31T00:00:00Z")
